programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: On the eve of their journey back to Alaska, Bird faces a life-changing crisis; on the ranch, Bear and Raiven decide to move up the mountain and finally start their life as a family.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: While Bird undergoes emergency surgery, Gabe embarks on a risky wood salvage mission for his homestead build; Raiven gets her first lesson in off-grid building with Bear.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: The siblings touch down in Haines, Alaska, on a mission to find a new homestead for Noah; on North Star Ranch, Bam and Gabe set out to deter encroaching predators hungry from hibernation; Bear introduces off-grid cuisine to Raiven.

programme.desc: The Wolfpack launches into spring with ambitions that will push them in new directions; Gabe and Bam ramp up their efforts to rebuild the ranch by turning burnt trees into lumber; Noah reveals epic plans for Alaska.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: Carrying three baby kangaroos and an emu, the Irwins caravan into the Australian Outback to release the animals on Mourachan, their giant wildlife conservation property; plans shift when they discover more animals in need of rescue along the way.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Scaled
programme.desc: Greg and habitat designer Lucas travel to Washington State to meet the Dasch family, who look to create a grand Mayan-inspired terrarium for their extensive collection of poisonous dart frogs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Scaled
programme.desc: Just south of Cornel's World, reptile and amphibian lover and rescuer, Stevie, enlists the team to come up with a sci-fi fantasy-themed enclosure for her basilisk lizard; the guys lay a little princess magic on a showpiece for three ball pythons.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: Terri helps prepare the zoo's new baby rhino, Carrie, to receive a lifesaving vaccine; Robert is on a rescue mission to save two black swans in very bad shape; Bindi tries to determine if a cranky wombat named Poa might be pregnant.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Troublesome alligators must be removed from a school playground, a nursery and a housing development; a Burmese python sinks its fangs into Tre.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Bob Freer makes the announcement that he is closing Everglades Outpost due to lack of funds after Jimmy gets bit by a gator; no outpost means no gator rescue as Paul races to keep the outpost open.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: A successful pet psychic is having trouble communicating with her vicious cat, Lily; Khloe the cat has developed erratic behavior after her owner discovered a colony of feral felines living behind the house.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: A man is tired of living in fear of his girlfriend's cat and vows if things don't change he will move out permanently. Meanwhile, a couple is convinced their feline Woody is the root cause behind their deceased cat's death.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tia readies for the worst as hurricane season approaches; a clue may help Mariah and the twins locate a dog's owner; Rico's grandparents adopt a shy dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tania and Tia rescue a sick dog from the streets; Chong's health deteriorates as his cancerous tumor continues to grow; Tia works on a long-distance adoption.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: Wildlife agents join a manhunt for an armed fugitive on the bayou; a nervous young hunter reveals a serious violation; a night shrimping bust leads to a familiar and unrepentant culprit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: When wildlife agents find an alligator with a fresh bullet wound to the head, nearby anglers are the prime suspects; an injured hunter must be evacuated by helicopter; agents use drones to track crabbers selling their catch across state lines.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: The search is on for a missing boater who may have suffered a stroke on Corney Lake; wildlife agents deploy as a hurricane makes landfall, rescuing stranded survivors from the floodwaters and dispensing lifesaving supplies.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: As a storm rolls in over St. Tammany Parish, Cpl. Blaine Wagner and Cpl. Rick Clark assist in a search-and-rescue mission for a missing fisherman; agents confront a repeat offender for harassing hunters, and a felon is caught with an illegal firearm.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: In Jackson Parish, a reckless hunter is investigated for shooting down a highway; agents stake out a man suspected of two illegal deer kills; duck hunters are confronted for harassment; a crowded boat parade ends with citations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: In Ouachita Parish, a trespassing investigation leads to a dicey encounter and multiple seizures of deer; agents confront a group of duck hunters who are spotted killing non-game birds; health code violations are found during a routine oyster patrol.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: In southern Louisiana, Lt. David Nunez and Sgt. Austin Arteaga investigate a group of bird hunters on opening day of teal season; a repeated offender is busted for taking immature crabs; a late-night deer decoy leads to a hunter in handcuffs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: Deep in the woods and bayous of Louisiana, wildlife agents protect the state's resources; a crab fisherman is caught stealing dozens of traps, a hunter crosses state lines with an illegal deer and agents rescue an injured bald eagle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: While using the LDWF's spy in the sky drone, agents track down a boat captain breaking the law in Plaquemines Parish; a family of shrimpers is investigated for pulling oversized nets; two feuding fishermen are suspected of being under the influence.
